song.title: He is Thy Life
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Jesus, Thy life is mine, Dwell evermore in me; And let me see That nothing can untwine Thy life from mine.
[V2] 2) Thy life in me be shown, Lord, I would hence forth seek To think and speak Thy thoughts, Thy words alone, No more my own.
[V3] 3) Thy love, Thy joy, Thy peace, Continuously impart Unto my heart, Fresh springs that never cease, But still increase.
[V4] 4) The blest reality Of resurrection pow’r, Thy Church’s dower, Life more abundantly, Lord, give to me.
[V5] 5) Thy fullest gift, O Lord, Now at Thy word I claim, Through Thy dear Name, And touch the rapturous chord Of praise forth-poured.
[V6] 6) Jesus, my life is Thine, And evermore shall be Hidden in Thee, For nothing can untwine Thy life from mine.
song.author: Frances R. havergal
